nasb.text: Then the captain of the guard took Seraiah the chief priest and Zephaniah the second priest, with the three officers of the temple.

esv.text: And the captain of the guard took Seraiah the chief priest and Zephaniah the second priest and the three keepers of the threshold;

cnv.text: 護衛長拿住祭司長西萊雅、副祭司長西番亞和三個守門的；

ccb.text: 护卫长尼布撒拉旦掳走祭司长西莱雅、副祭司长西番亚和三名殿门守卫，
